background: Homeworld: Arisia/Jardin (B57A566-D). Brilliant engineer who suffered chemical exposure causing cystic and muscular fibrosis. Cyber augments restored endurance but not strength. 'Chives' nickname from unfailing politeness.
education: Corporate technical training and colonist engineering certification
terms: Citizen (Corporate): Admin-0, Electronics (sensors)-1, Engineer (j-drive)-1. Corporate tech specializing in factories, reactors, and digesters. Advanced to rank 1.
Citizen (Corporate): Engineer (j-drive)-2, Mechanic-1. Building everything from corp tech to starship components. Chemical emission injury occurred.
Citizen (Colonist): Athletics (endurance)-1, Jack-of-all-Trades-1, Vacc Suit-1. Colonist work while recovering. Cyber augments installed. Advanced to rank 1.
Citizen (Colonist): Electronics (sensors)-2, Science (robotics)-1. Specialized in sensor systems and automated equipment.

Agent (Intelligence): Athletics (endurance)-2, Jack-of-all-Trades-2, Computer-1. Recruited by SolSec for technical expertise despite physical limitations. Neural computer link augmentation. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Advanced to rank 1. Mustering out: Comprehensive Engineer's Toolkit, Neural Interface Cable, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Jump drive engineering, power systems, sensor electronics, robotics, jack-of-all-trades problem solving, neural computer interfacing
Weaknesses: STR 2 (physical tasks difficult), requires cyber augments for endurance, overly polite (can slow critical moments), chemical sensitivity

augmentations.name: Endurance Enhancement (internal)
augmentations.description: Augmented lungs and muscular support system

augmentations.name: Neural Computer Link
augmentations.description: Direct neural interface for computer systems
augmentations.effect: Can interface directly with computers and ship systems

augmentations.name: Pain Suppression System
augmentations.effect: No penalties from injury until END reaches 0

weapons.name: None (STR too low for most weapons)
